title: E2E inference validation on the shipped format

results.note: Both task tokens produce coherent output with correct routing on the bf16 merged checkpoint. This is the final shipped format at the bf16 tier.

quantized_shipped_format.note: E2E on the quantized tier (Q8 GGUF via Ollama, or AWQ via vLLM) runs once PKG-03 produces a tier that clears the +/-2pp gate. Protocol: serve final artifact, 20 <wp_gen> + 20 <wp_judge> prompts (data/phase4_4/smoke_prompts.json), verify coherent output + task-token routing. Recipe: scripts/run_packaging_recipe.md.
